sentence: Never deploy your brizzler mid-chronchalashout. The room will feel both.

wombos.definition: A bro known specifically for his rizz — the friend you bring along when the night requires a strong cold open. The wingman archetype.
wombos.example: Bring the brizzler — he'll handle the cold open.

wombos.definition: A weed-aided nonchalashout — composure held together by THC while the inner crashout simmers quietly underneath.
wombos.example: After the third bowl he settled into a slow chronchalashout.
